---
title: "PHÂN TÍCH VÀ SO SÁNH HỆ SỐ LÂY NHIỄM SỞI (18-19 & 24-25)"
author: "Anh Huynh"
format: 
  docx:
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.path: "images/"   
    fig.format: "png"       
    fig.dpi: 300
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(EpiEstim)
library(patchwork)
library(sf)
library(viridis)
library(ggspatial)
library(ggsci)

# ==========================================
# 0. CHUẨN BỊ DỮ LIỆU
# ==========================================

df_1819 <- readRDS("df_1819.rds")
df_2425 <- readRDS("df_2425.rds")

# Khai báo biến toàn cục
si_mean <- 14.5
si_sd <- 3.25
shape_val <- (si_mean^2) / (si_sd^2)
scale_val <- (si_sd^2) / si_mean
tuoi_levels <- c("<1", "1-5", "6-10", "11-15", ">15")

# Hàm xử lý kết quả Cori (Của mày)
process_cori <- function(mod_data) {
  mod_data$R %>%
    mutate(
      ngay_nv = mod_data$dates[t_end],
      q1_rt = `Quantile.0.025(R)`,
      q3_rt = `Quantile.0.975(R)`,
      rt = `Mean(R)`,
      method = "Cori et al."
    ) %>%
    select(ngay_nv, rt, q1_rt, q3_rt, method)
}
```

```{r calc_models, include=FALSE}
# ==========================================
# 1. TÍNH TOÁN CORI VÀ WALLINGA CHO 18-19
# ==========================================
# CORI 18-19
ob1_incid <- df_1819 %>% group_by(ngay_nv) %>% summarise(I = n()) %>%
  complete(ngay_nv = seq(min(ngay_nv), max(ngay_nv), by = "day"), fill = list(I = 0))
t_start1 <- seq(2, nrow(ob1_incid) - 13)
mod1 <- estimate_R(incid = ob1_incid %>% 
                     rename(dates = ngay_nv), method = "parametric_si", 
                   config = make_config(list(mean_si = si_mean, std_si = si_sd, 
                                             t_start = t_start1, t_end = t_start1 + 13)))
cori_1819 <- process_cori(mod1) %>% mutate(outbreak = "2018-2020") %>%  
  filter(ngay_nv >= min(ngay_nv >= min(ngay_nv), ngay_nv <= max(ngay_nv) - 14))

# WALLINGA 18-20
t1 <- as.numeric(df_1819$ngay_nv)
delta1 <- outer(t1, t1, `-`)
W1 <- dgamma(delta1, shape = shape_val, scale = scale_val); W1[delta1 <= 0] <- 0
# P1 <- sweep(W1, 2, colSums(W1, na.rm = TRUE), `/`); P1[is.na(P1)] <- 0
# df_1819$R_i <- rowSums(P1, na.rm = TRUE)
P1 <- sweep(W1, 2, rowSums(W1, na.rm = TRUE), `/`); P1[is.na(P1)] <- 0
df_1819$R_i <- colSums(P1, na.rm = TRUE)

wal_overall_1819 <- df_1819 %>% 
  group_by(ngay_nv) %>%
  summarise(so_ca = n(), rt = mean(R_i, na.rm=T), 
            se = sqrt(rt/so_ca), .groups='drop') %>%
  mutate(q1_rt = pmax(0, rt - 1.96*se), q3_rt = rt + 1.96*se, method = "Wallinga & Teunis", outbreak = "2018-2020") %>%
  filter(ngay_nv >= min(ngay_nv) + 14, ngay_nv <= max(ngay_nv) - 14) 

wal_age_1819 <- df_1819 %>% 
  group_by(ngay_nv, nhom_tuoi) %>%
  summarise(so_ca = n(), rt = mean(R_i, na.rm=T), 
            se = sqrt(rt/so_ca), .groups='drop') %>%
  mutate(q1_rt = pmax(0, rt - 1.96*se), q3_rt = rt + 1.96*se, outbreak = "2018-2020") %>%
  filter(ngay_nv >= min(ngay_nv) + 14, ngay_nv <= max(ngay_nv) - 14)

# ==========================================
# 2. TÍNH TOÁN CORI VÀ WALLINGA CHO 24-25
# ==========================================
# CORI 24-25
ob2_incid <- df_2425 %>% group_by(ngay_nv) %>% 
  summarise(I = n()) %>%
  complete(ngay_nv = seq(min(ngay_nv), max(ngay_nv), by = "day"), fill = list(I = 0))
t_start2 <- seq(2, nrow(ob2_incid) - 13)
mod2 <- estimate_R(incid = ob2_incid %>% 
                     rename(dates = ngay_nv), method = "parametric_si", 
                   config = make_config(list(mean_si = si_mean, std_si = si_sd, 
                                             t_start = t_start2, t_end = t_start2 + 13)))
cori_2425 <- process_cori(mod2) %>% 
  mutate(outbreak = "2024-2025") %>%  
  filter(ngay_nv >= min(ngay_nv), ngay_nv <= max(ngay_nv) - 14)

# WALLINGA 24-25
t2 <- as.numeric(df_2425$ngay_nv)
delta2 <- outer(t2, t2, `-`)
W2 <- dgamma(delta2, shape = shape_val, scale = scale_val); W2[delta2 <= 0] <- 0
# P2 <- sweep(W2, 2, colSums(W2, na.rm = TRUE), `/`); P2[is.na(P2)] <- 0
# df_2425$R_i <- rowSums(P2, na.rm = TRUE)
P2 <- sweep(W2, 2, rowSums(W2, na.rm = TRUE), `/`); P2[is.na(P2)] <- 0
df_2425$R_i <- colSums(P2, na.rm = TRUE)

wal_overall_2425 <- df_2425 %>% 
  group_by(ngay_nv) %>%
  summarise(so_ca = n(), rt = mean(R_i, na.rm=T), 
            se = sqrt(rt/so_ca), .groups='drop') %>%
  mutate(q1_rt = pmax(0, rt - 1.96*se), q3_rt = rt + 1.96*se, method = "Wallinga & Teunis", outbreak = "2024-2025") %>%
  filter(ngay_nv >= min(ngay_nv) + 14, ngay_nv <= max(ngay_nv) - 14)

wal_age_2425 <- df_2425 %>% 
  group_by(ngay_nv, nhom_tuoi) %>%
  summarise(so_ca = n(), rt = mean(R_i, na.rm=T), 
            se = sqrt(rt/so_ca), .groups='drop') %>%
  mutate(q1_rt = pmax(0, rt - 1.96*se), q3_rt = rt + 1.96*se, outbreak = "2024-2025") %>%
  filter(ngay_nv >= min(ngay_nv) + 14, ngay_nv <= max(ngay_nv) - 14) 
```

## 1. Epidemic curves

```{r}
timeline_1819 <- data.frame(
  category = factor(c("Time of the outbreak", "Vaccination campaign", "Time from start to peak"),
                    levels = c("Time of the outbreak", "Vaccination campaign", "Time from start to peak")),
  start = as.Date(c("2018-08-27", "2018-12-01", "2018-08-27")),
  end = as.Date(c("2020-03-31", "2019-05-31", "2019-01-31")),
  label = c("19.1 months", "Non-selective (6 months)", "5.1 months"),
  color_group = c("outbreak", "vax", "peak")
)

timeline_2425 <- data.frame(
  category = factor(c("Time of the outbreak", "Vaccination campaign", "Time from start to peak"),
                    levels = c("Time of the outbreak", "Vaccination campaign", "Time from start to peak")),
  start = as.Date(c("2024-05-28", "2024-08-31", "2024-05-28")),
  end = as.Date(c("2025-12-03", "2025-03-31", "2025-01-06")),
  label = c("18.2 months", "Selective (7 months)", "7.3 months"),
  color_group = c("outbreak", "vax", "peak")
)

build_epidemic_panel <- function(df_cases, df_timeline, title_label, x_limits, date_breaks_val, x_title = NULL) {
  
  all_milestones <- unique(c(df_timeline$start, df_timeline$end))
  
  p_curve <- df_cases %>% 
    group_by(ngay_nv) %>% 
    summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = ngay_nv, y = cases)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#415A77", width = 1) +
    
    geom_vline(xintercept = all_milestones, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray75", linewidth = 0.5) +

    geom_vline(xintercept = df_timeline$end[df_timeline$category == "Time from start to peak"], 
               linetype = "solid", color = "darkred", linewidth = 0.8) +
               
    scale_x_date(limits = x_limits, date_breaks = date_breaks_val, date_labels = "%m/%Y") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
    labs(title = title_label, x = NULL, y = "Number of cases") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),

      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(r = 10)), 
      axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.line.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray95", linetype = "solid")
    )
  
  
  p_time <- ggplot(df_timeline) +

    geom_vline(xintercept = all_milestones, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray75", linewidth = 0.5) +
    
    geom_segment(aes(x = start, xend = end, y = category, yend = category, color = color_group), 
                 linewidth = 3.5, lineend = "butt") +
    geom_text(aes(x = start + (end - start)/2, y = category, label = label), 
              vjust = -0.7, size = 4.2, fontface = "bold") +
              
    scale_color_manual(values = c("outbreak" = "#5A5A5A", "vax" = "#2a9d8f", "peak" = "#e76f51")) +
   
     scale_x_date(limits = x_limits, date_breaks = date_breaks_val, date_labels = "%m/%Y") +
    
    scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.15, 0.45))) +
    
    labs(x = x_title, y = NULL) +
    
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 10)),
      axis.line.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)
    )
  
  combined <- p_curve / p_time + plot_layout(heights = c(3.7, 2.3))
  return(combined)
}

lims_1819 <- c(as.Date("2018-08-15"), as.Date("2020-04-15"))
panel_A <- build_epidemic_panel(df_cases = df_1819, 
                                df_timeline = timeline_1819, 
                                title_label = "(A) Outbreak 2018-2020", 
                                x_limits = lims_1819, 
                                date_breaks_val = "1 month",
                                x_title = NULL) 

lims_2425 <- c(as.Date("2024-05-15"), as.Date("2025-12-31"))
panel_B <- build_epidemic_panel(df_cases = df_2425, 
                                df_timeline = timeline_2425, 
                                title_label = "(B) Outbreak 2024-2025", 
                                x_limits = lims_2425, 
                                date_breaks_val = "1 month",
                                x_title = "Date admission") 

caption_text <- "Vaccination campaign age groups:\nOutbreak 2018-2020: 1-5 years | Outbreak 2024-2025: 1-5 years, 6-10 years, 6-9 months"

final_plot <- (wrap_elements(full = panel_A) / wrap_elements(full = panel_B)) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = caption_text,
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 12, face = "italic", color = "black", margin = margin(t = 15))
    )
  )

final_plot
```

## 2. Cases by are group

```{r}
age_levels <- c("<1", "1-5", "6-10", "11-15", ">15")

my_colors <- c("<1" = "#4575b4", 
               "1-5" = "#91bfdb", 
               "6-10" = "#fee090", 
               "11-15" = "#fc8d59", 
               ">15" = "#d73027")


plot_age_dist <- function(df, title_text) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      month_yr = floor_date(ngay_nv, "month"),
      nhom_tuoi = factor(nhom_tuoi, levels = age_levels)
    ) %>%
    group_by(month_yr, nhom_tuoi) %>%
    summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = month_yr, y = cases, fill = nhom_tuoi)) +
    
    geom_col(position = position_fill(reverse = TRUE), width = 25, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) + 
    
    scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    
    scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%m/%y", expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))) +
    
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = NULL,
      y = NULL,
      fill = "Age group"
    ) +
    
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 16),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12, color = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), 
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8)
    )
}

p_A <- plot_age_dist(df_1819, "(A) Outbreak 2018-2020")
p_B <- plot_age_dist(df_2425, "(B) Outbreak 2024-2025")

final_plot <- p_A / p_B + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

final_plot
```

```{r}
age_levels <- c("<1", "1-5", "6-10", "11-15", ">15")

pal_1819 <- c("<1" = "#4575B4",     
              "1-5" = "#D73027",    
              "6-10" = "#FC8D59",   
              "11-15" = "#FEE090",  
              ">15" = "#BDBDBD")   

pal_2425 <- c("<1" = "#BDBDBD",    
              "1-5" = "#4575B4",    
              "6-10" = "#D73027", 
              "11-15" = "#FC8D59",  
              ">15" = "#FEE090")    


plot_age_dist <- function(df, title_text, custom_pal) {
    df %>%
        mutate(
            month_yr = floor_date(ngay_nv, "month"),
            nhom_tuoi = factor(nhom_tuoi, levels = age_levels)
        ) %>%
        group_by(month_yr, nhom_tuoi) %>%
        summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
        ggplot(aes(x = month_yr, y = cases, fill = nhom_tuoi)) +
        
        geom_col(position = position_fill(reverse = TRUE), width = 25, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) + 
        
        scale_fill_manual(values = custom_pal) +
        scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = c(0, 0)) +
        scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%m/%y", expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))) +
        
        labs(
            title = title_text,
            x = NULL,
            y = NULL,
            fill = "Age group"
        ) +
        
        theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 16),
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12, color = "black"),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
            legend.position = "right", 
            legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
            legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), 
            panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8)
        )
}

p_A <- plot_age_dist(df_1819, "(A) Cohort tracking 2018 - 2020", pal_1819)
p_B <- plot_age_dist(df_2425, "(B) Cohort tracking 2024 - 2025", pal_2425)

final_plot <- p_A / p_B 

final_plot
```

## 3. Cummulative incidence per 100k population

```{r}
df_1819 <- df_1819 |> mutate(outbreak = "2018-2020")
df_2425 <- df_1819 |> mutate(outbreak = "2024-2025")

df_combined <- bind_rows(df_1819, df_2425)
num_phases <- 6 

phase_info <- df_combined %>%
  group_by(outbreak) %>%
  summarise(
    start_date = min(ngay_nv),
    end_date = max(ngay_nv),
    total_days = as.numeric(difftime(max(ngay_nv), min(ngay_nv), units = "days")),
    days_per_phase = round(total_days / num_phases),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    start_str = paste(month.abb[month(start_date)], year(start_date)),
    end_str = paste(month.abb[month(end_date)], year(end_date)),
    info_text = paste0(outbreak, " (", start_str, " to ", end_str, "): ~", days_per_phase, " days/phase")
  )

caption_text <- paste(
  paste0("Note: Each outbreak period is divided into ", num_phases, " equal phases."),
  paste(phase_info$info_text, collapse = "\n"),
  sep = "\n"
)

cases_agg <- df_combined %>%
  group_by(outbreak) %>%
  mutate(
    period = cut(ngay_nv, breaks = num_phases, labels = paste("Phase", 1:num_phases))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(outbreak, quan_huyen, period) %>%
  summarise(new_cases = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  complete(quan_huyen, nesting(outbreak, period), fill = list(new_cases = 0)) %>%
  arrange(outbreak, quan_huyen, period) %>%
  group_by(outbreak, quan_huyen) %>%
  mutate(cum_cases = cumsum(new_cases)) %>%
  ungroup()

pop <- readxl::read_excel("pop.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("pop_"), as.numeric)) %>%
  select(quan_huyen, pop_2019, pop_2024)

map_hcm <- st_read("gadm41_VNM.gpkg", layer = "ADM_ADM_2") %>%
  filter(NAME_1 == "Hồ Chí Minh") %>%
  mutate(NAME_2 = case_when(
    NAME_2 %in% c("Thủ Đức", "Quận 9", "Quận 2") ~ "Thành phố Thủ Đức",
    TRUE ~ NAME_2
  )) %>%
  group_by(NAME_2) %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_union(geom), .groups = "drop") %>%
  rename(quan_huyen = NAME_2)

cases_full <- cases_agg %>%
  left_join(pop, by = "quan_huyen") %>%
  mutate(
    pop_used = ifelse(outbreak == "2018-2020", pop_2019, pop_2024),
    incidence_rate = (cum_cases / pop_used) * 100000
  )

map_cases_sf <- map_hcm %>%
  right_join(cases_full, by = "quan_huyen", relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  mutate(
    fill_var1 = ifelse(incidence_rate == 0, NA, incidence_rate)
  )

p <- ggplot(map_cases_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = fill_var1), color = "black", size = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_gsea(
    name = "Cumulative incidence\n(per 100,000 population)",
    na.value = "white",
    limits = c(0, max(map_cases_sf$fill_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) +
  facet_grid(outbreak ~ period) +
  
  labs(caption = caption_text) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 12, face = "italic", color = "grey30", margin = margin(t = 15))
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barwidth = 20, barheight = 0.8,
      ticks.colour = "black",
      label.position = "bottom",
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust = 0.5
    )
  )
```

## 4. Diễn tiến lây nhiễm chung toàn Thành phố (So sánh phương pháp)

```{r Figure 4, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dpi=300}
# 1. Gộp 4 bộ dữ liệu Rt thành 1 để xài facet gọn gàng
df_overall <- bind_rows(cori_1819, wal_overall_1819, cori_2425, wal_overall_2425)

# 2. Tính số ca bệnh theo ngày cho từng đợt dịch (Giữ nguyên toàn bộ data)
df_cases <- bind_rows(
  df_1819 %>% group_by(ngay_nv) %>% summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop"),
  df_2425 %>% group_by(ngay_nv) %>% summarise(cases = n(), .groups = "drop")
)

# 3. Tính hệ số chuyển đổi trục Y cho biểu đồ trục kép
max_rt_display <- 5
max_cases <- max(df_cases$cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_factor <- max_cases / 4

ggplot() +

  geom_col(data = df_cases, aes(x = ngay_nv, y = cases / scale_factor), 
           fill = "#5A5A5A", alpha = 0.6, width = 1) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_ribbon(data = df_overall, aes(x = ngay_nv, ymin = q1_rt, ymax = q3_rt, fill = method), alpha = 0.25, color = NA) +
  geom_line(data = df_overall, aes(x = ngay_nv, y = rt, color = method), linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ outbreak, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%m/%Y") +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Rt (95% CIs)",
    limits = c(0, max_rt_display),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . * scale_factor, name = "Cases per day")
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Cori et al." = "#d95f02", "Wallinga & Teunis" = "#1f78b4")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Cori et al." = "#d95f02", "Wallinga & Teunis" = "#1f78b4")) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) + 
  labs(x = "Date admission", color = "Methods", fill = "Methods") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20, color = "white"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray30"),
    axis.title.y.left = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, color = "black", angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, color = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: statistical_comparison

# Gộp dữ liệu để so sánh cặp (Paired)
df_compare <- inner_join(
  bind_rows(cori_1819, cori_2425) %>% select(ngay_nv, outbreak, rt_cori = rt),
  bind_rows(wal_overall_1819, wal_overall_2425) %>% select(ngay_nv, outbreak, rt_wal = rt),
  by = c("ngay_nv", "outbreak")
)

# Chạy test Wilcoxon cho từng đợt
test_1819 <- wilcox.test(df_compare$rt_cori[df_compare$outbreak == "2018-2020"], 
                         df_compare$rt_wal[df_compare$outbreak == "2018-2020"], paired = TRUE)

test_2425 <- wilcox.test(df_compare$rt_cori[df_compare$outbreak == "2024-2025"], 
                         df_compare$rt_wal[df_compare$outbreak == "2024-2025"], paired = TRUE)

# Tính Median để nhận xét
stats_summary <- df_compare %>%
  group_by(outbreak) %>%
  summarise(
    med_cori = median(rt_cori),
    med_wal = median(rt_wal),
    p_value = ifelse(first(outbreak) == "2018-2020", test_1819$p.value, test_2425$p.value)
  )

print(stats_summary)
```

## 5. Diễn tiến Rt theo nhóm tuổi (Phương pháp Wallinga & Teunis)

```{r Figure 5, fig.width=14, fig.height=10, dpi=300}
# Gộp dữ liệu 2 đợt dịch
df_age <- bind_rows(wal_age_1819, wal_age_2425)
df_age$nhom_tuoi <- factor(df_age$nhom_tuoi, levels = tuoi_levels)

ggplot(df_age, aes(x = ngay_nv, y = rt, color = nhom_tuoi, fill = nhom_tuoi)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = q1_rt, ymax = q3_rt), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  facet_grid(nhom_tuoi ~ outbreak, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%m/%Y") +
  labs(x = "Date admission", y = "Rt (95% CIs)") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    
    panel.spacing.x = unit(2, "lines"), 
    
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, color = "black", size = 18),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, color = "white"),
    
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18, color = "black", angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black", face = "bold"),
    
    strip.background.x = element_rect(fill = "gray30"),
    strip.background.y = element_rect(fill = "lightblue")
  )
```

## 6. Bản đồ nhiệt diễn tiến Rt theo Quận/Huyện

```{r}
#| label: Figure 6
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 12

library(ggsci) # Nạp thư viện ggsci

# 1. HÀM CHUẨN BỊ DỮ LIỆU
prep_heatmap <- function(df_data, out_name) {
  df_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(quan_huyen) & quan_huyen != "") %>%
    filter(ngay_nv >= min(ngay_nv) + 14, ngay_nv <= max(ngay_nv) - 14) %>%
    mutate(month = floor_date(ngay_nv, "month")) %>%
    group_by(quan_huyen, month) %>%
    summarise(rt = mean(R_i, na.rm = TRUE), cases = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    complete(quan_huyen, month, fill = list(rt = NA, cases = 0)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(month)) %>%
    mutate(outbreak = out_name)
}

df_dist <- bind_rows(prep_heatmap(df_1819, "2018-2020"), prep_heatmap(df_2425, "2024-2025"))

# 2. PHÂN NHÓM QUẬN/HUYỆN THEO HƯỚNG ĐỊA LÝ TPHCM
df_dist <- df_dist %>%
  mutate(khu_vuc = case_when(
    quan_huyen %in% c("Quận 1", "Quận 3", "Quận 4", "Quận 5", "Quận 6", 
                      "Quận 8", "Quận 10", "Quận 11", "Phú Nhuận", 
                      "Bình Thạnh", "Gò Vấp", "Tân Bình", "Tân Phú") ~ "Center",
    quan_huyen == "Thành phố Thủ Đức" ~ "East",
    quan_huyen %in% c("Bình Tân", "Bình Chánh") ~ "West",
    quan_huyen %in% c("Quận 7", "Nhà Bè", "Cần Giờ") ~ "South",
    quan_huyen %in% c("Quận 12", "Hóc Môn", "Củ Chi") ~ "North",
    TRUE ~ "Chưa phân loại"
  ))

df_dist$khu_vuc <- factor(df_dist$khu_vuc, levels = c("Center", "East", "West", "South", "North"))
df_dist <- df_dist %>% arrange(khu_vuc, quan_huyen)
df_dist$quan_huyen <- factor(df_dist$quan_huyen, levels = unique(df_dist$quan_huyen))

# 3. TẠO DỮ LIỆU CHO ĐƯỜNG CONG DỊCH (TOP PLOT)
df_curve <- df_dist %>%
  group_by(outbreak, month) %>%
  summarise(total_cases = sum(cases, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop')

# 4. VẼ BIỂU ĐỒ ĐƯỜNG CONG DỊCH (TOP PLOT)
p_top <- ggplot(df_curve, aes(x = month, y = total_cases)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1b9e77", color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) + 
  facet_wrap(~ outbreak, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_void() + 
  theme(
    strip.text = element_blank(), 
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(b = 0, t = 10, l = 5, r = 5)
  )

# 5. VẼ HEATMAP VỚI MÀU GSEA (BOTTOM PLOT)
p_heat <- ggplot(df_dist, aes(x = month, y = quan_huyen, fill = rt)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  
  # SỬ DỤNG THANG MÀU GSEA
  scale_fill_gsea(
    name = "Rt", 
    limits = c(0, max(df_dist$rt, na.rm=T)), 
    na.value = "gray95"
  ) +
  
  facet_grid(khu_vuc ~ outbreak, scales = "free", space = "free_y") +
  
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%m/%Y") +
  labs(x = "Date admission", y = "") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"), 
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20, color = "white"),
    strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "black", angle = 0),
    strip.background.x = element_rect(fill = "gray30"),
    strip.background.y = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
    
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.key.width = unit(2, "cm"),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 0, b = 5, l = 5, r = 5)
  )

# 6. GÉP 2 BIỂU ĐỒ VỚI PATCHWORK
p_final <- p_top / p_heat + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 6))

p_final
```

## 7. Ma trận tương quan lây nhiễm F0 - F1 theo nhóm tuổi

```{r plot_4_matrix, fig.width=12, fig.height=6, , dpi=300}
# # Hàm tính ma trận
# calc_matrix <- function(df_data) {
#   mat <- matrix(0, nrow = length(tuoi_levels), ncol = length(tuoi_levels))
#   rownames(mat) <- tuoi_levels; colnames(mat) <- tuoi_levels
#   
#   t_val <- as.numeric(df_data$ngay_nv)
#   del <- outer(t_val, t_val, `-`)
#   W_mat <- dgamma(del, shape = shape_val, scale = scale_val); W_mat[del <= 0] <- 0
#   P_mat <- sweep(W_mat, 2, colSums(W_mat, na.rm = TRUE), `/`); P_mat[is.na(P_mat)] <- 0
#   
#   for (nguon in tuoi_levels) {
#     for (nhan in tuoi_levels) {
#       idx_nguon <- which(df_data$nhom_tuoi == nguon)
#       idx_nhan <- which(df_data$nhom_tuoi == nhan)
#       if (length(idx_nguon) > 0) mat[nguon, nhan] <- sum(P_mat[idx_nguon, idx_nhan], na.rm = TRUE) / length(idx_nguon)
#     }
#   }
#   
#   df_hm <- as.data.frame(as.table(mat))
#   colnames(df_hm) <- c("Nhom_nguon", "Nhom_nhan", "R_value")
#   df_hm$Nhom_nguon <- factor(df_hm$Nhom_nguon, levels = rev(tuoi_levels))
#   df_hm$Nhom_nhan <- factor(df_hm$Nhom_nhan, levels = tuoi_levels)
#   return(df_hm)
# }
# 
# df_mat <- bind_rows(
#   calc_matrix(df_1819) %>% mutate(outbreak = "2018-2019"),
#   calc_matrix(df_2425) %>% mutate(outbreak = "2024-2025")
# )
# 
# ggplot(df_mat, aes(x = Nhom_nhan, y = Nhom_nguon, fill = R_value)) +
#   geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
#   geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", R_value), color = R_value > 0.25), size = 4.5, fontface = "bold", show.legend = FALSE) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "white")) +
#   scale_fill_gradientn(colors = c("#FFFFCC", "#FFEDA0", "#FEB24C", "#E31A1C", "#800026"), name = "Rt") +
#   coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
#   facet_wrap(~ outbreak, ncol = 2) +
#   labs(x = "F1", y = "F0") +
#   theme(
#     strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, color = "white"),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
#     axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
#     axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
#     legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
#     legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
#     strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray30"),
#     legend.position = "bottom", 
#     legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm"), 
#     panel.grid = element_blank()
#   )
```

```{r plot_6_matrix}
#| label: Figure 7
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 10

# Hàm tính ma trận (Giữ nguyên logic nhưng tối ưu đầu vào)
calc_matrix_period <- function(df_data, period_name) {
  if(nrow(df_data) == 0) return(NULL) # Phòng hờ dữ liệu trống
  
  mat <- matrix(0, nrow = length(tuoi_levels), ncol = length(tuoi_levels))
  rownames(mat) <- tuoi_levels; colnames(mat) <- tuoi_levels
  
  t_val <- as.numeric(df_data$ngay_nv)
  del <- outer(t_val, t_val, `-`)
  W_mat <- dgamma(del, shape = shape_val, scale = scale_val); W_mat[del <= 0] <- 0
  P_mat <- sweep(W_mat, 2, colSums(W_mat, na.rm = TRUE), `/`); P_mat[is.na(P_mat)] <- 0
  
  for (nguon in tuoi_levels) {
    for (nhan in tuoi_levels) {
      idx_nguon <- which(df_data$nhom_tuoi == nguon)
      idx_nhan <- which(df_data$nhom_tuoi == nhan)
      if (length(idx_nguon) > 0) mat[nguon, nhan] <- sum(P_mat[idx_nguon, idx_nhan], na.rm = TRUE) / length(idx_nguon)
    }
  }
  
  df_hm <- as.data.frame(as.table(mat))
  colnames(df_hm) <- c("Nhom_nguon", "Nhom_nhan", "R_value")
  df_hm$Nhom_nguon <- factor(df_hm$Nhom_nguon, levels = rev(tuoi_levels))
  df_hm$Nhom_nhan <- factor(df_hm$Nhom_nhan, levels = tuoi_levels)
  df_hm$period <- period_name
  return(df_hm)
}

# TÍNH TOÁN CHO 6 NHÓM
# Đợt 2018-2019
m1_all <- calc_matrix_period(df_1819, "Overall")
m1_pre <- calc_matrix_period(df_1819 %>% filter(ngay_nv < "2018-12-01"), "Pre-intervention")
m1_post <- calc_matrix_period(df_1819 %>% filter(ngay_nv >= "2018-12-01"), "Post-intervention")

# Đợt 2024-2025
m2_all <- calc_matrix_period(df_2425, "Overall")
m2_pre <- calc_matrix_period(df_2425 %>% filter(ngay_nv < "2024-08-31"), "Pre-intervention")
m2_post <- calc_matrix_period(df_2425 %>% filter(ngay_nv >= "2024-08-31"), "Post-intervention")

# Gộp tất cả lại
df_mat_final <- bind_rows(
  m1_all %>% mutate(outbreak = "2018-2020"),
  m1_pre %>% mutate(outbreak = "2018-2020"),
  m1_post %>% mutate(outbreak = "2018-2020"),
  m2_all %>% mutate(outbreak = "2024-2025"),
  m2_pre %>% mutate(outbreak = "2024-2025"),
  m2_post %>% mutate(outbreak = "2024-2025")
)

# Sắp xếp thứ tự hiển thị của Period
df_mat_final$period <- factor(df_mat_final$period, 
                               levels = c("Overall", "Pre-intervention", "Post-intervention"))

# VẼ 6 HÌNH TRÊN 1 LƯỚI
ggplot(df_mat_final, aes(x = Nhom_nhan, y = Nhom_nguon, fill = R_value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # Đổi màu chữ (Trắng/Đen) tùy theo độ đậm nhạt của nền để dễ đọc
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", R_value)), color = "black", 
            size = 5, fontface = "bold", show.legend = FALSE) +
  
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colors = c("#FFFFCC", "#FFEDA0", "#FEB24C", "#FC4E2A", "#B10026"), # 5 màu
    breaks = c(0.15, 0.3, 0.45, 0.6), # 4 nhát cắt cách đều
    limits = c(0, 0.65),              # Chốt max 0.65 ôm trọn 0.614
    name = "Rt",
    na.value = "gray95"
  ) +
  # =================================================================
  
  # SỬ DỤNG FACET_GRID ĐỂ CHIA 2 DÒNG (Đợt dịch) VÀ 3 CỘT (Giai đoạn)
  facet_grid(outbreak ~ period) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  labs(x = "F1", y = "F0") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20, color = "white"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray30"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.key.width = unit(2.5, "cm"), # Kéo dài thanh legend ra chút cho đẹp
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 18, face = "bold")
  )
```
